arts.ttl: Manchester United XI vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United make the trip to Molineux to face Wolves in the Premier League on Boxing Day. Ruben Amorim will be demanding a response from his side after back-to-back defeats, including a 3-0 humbling at home to Bournemouth last weekend. arts.ttl: Wolves vs Man Utd preview: Pereira backs Amorim for Premier League success
arts.sum: Defiant Ruben Amorim insists Marcus Rashford's absence is not a distraction and that he knows what he is doing as the head coach seeks to get the best out of the forward and turn Manchester United around. The 27-year-old fuelled speculation by admitting he was "ready for a new challenge" in a midweek interview, meaning the England international remained a hot topic ahead of the Boxing Day trip to Wolves.

arts.ttl: Napoli & Man Utd Touted for High-Profile Swap Deal
arts.sum: Napoli and Manchester United could arrange a mouth-watering swap deal in January involving Victor Osimhen and Marcus Rashford. According to recent reports in England, Ruben Amorim is keen on the Partenopei loanee after an underwhelming start to Old Trafford life.
